game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **Kingdom Rush Origins - TD:** Players defend a set number of entry points from waves of over 30 distinct enemy types by strategically placing and upgrading 4 core tower types (Archer, Mage, Barracks, Stone Druid) along predefined paths on a 2D map. Each core tower can be upgraded up to 3 times, then specialized into one of two advanced forms (e.g., Elf Archers to Golden Longbows or Wild Magus), each possessing 3 unique active or passive abilities that can be further upgraded using collected stars. Defeating enemies grants gold, which is used to build new towers or upgrade existing ones, while a chosen hero (from 16 available, each with 3 unique skills and 1 ultimate ability) can be moved freely along the path and spells like "Reinforcements" or "Lightning Bolt" can be cast with cooldowns (e.g., 20-60 seconds). Completing levels earns up to 3 stars based on remaining lives (starting with 20), which are spent on a global upgrade tree to enhance tower stats (e.g., +5% damage, -10% cost) and hero abilities, with 3 difficulty settings (Casual, Normal, Veteran) and 3 challenge modes (Classic, Heroic, Iron) offering varied enemy compositions and restrictions. A level is won by successfully eliminating all enemy waves before 20 enemies breach the final exit point, while losing all lives results in mission failure, requiring a restart of the level.
game_info.description: Defend your kingdom from relentless waves of enemies! Strategically place towers along the path to stop invaders from reaching your base. You start with 20 lives and must survive all waves to win. Earn gold by defeating enemies to build and upgrade towers. Choose from Archer, Mage, Barracks, and Druid towers, each with unique abilities. Upgrade towers to unlock powerful specializations. Deploy your hero strategically and use special abilities to turn the tide of battle. Earn stars based on performance to unlock global upgrades between levels.
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move hero character
Space: Place/Select tower at cursor position
Shift: Upgrade selected tower
Z: Use hero special ability
1-4 Keys: Select tower type (1=Archer, 2=Mage, 3=Barracks, 4=Druid)
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause
R: Restart to main menu

TEST_1.test_description: Test basic tower placement and enemy wave mechanics. Verify that towers can be placed, enemies spawn correctly, and basic combat interactions work as expected.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Place a mix of archer and mage towers at strategic points along the path. Focus on coverage of the early path sections. Avoid upgrading to test base tower functionality.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Towers should successfully attack enemies, deal damage, and reduce enemy health. Enemies should follow the path correctly. Gold should accumulate from kills. Test passes if at least one wave is cleared without errors.

TEST_1.expected: Towers should successfully attack enemies, deal damage, and reduce enemy health. Enemies should follow the path correctly. Gold should accumulate from kills. Test passes if at least one wave is cleared without errors.

TEST_2.test_description: Test optimal strategy to win the game by defeating all enemy waves while maintaining sufficient lives. Validates complete game loop from start to victory condition.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively place archer towers early for cost efficiency. Upgrade key towers to tier 2-3. Add barracks towers at critical choke points. Use mage towers for area damage. Deploy hero to help defend weak spots and use abilities strategically.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defeat all enemy waves with lives remaining. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state. Test demonstrates that the game is winnable with optimal tower placement, upgrades, and hero management.

TEST_3.test_description: Test tower upgrade system and specialization paths. Verify that towers can be upgraded through multiple tiers and that specializations unlock and function correctly.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Place initial towers and accumulate gold. Systematically upgrade towers through all tiers. Test both specialization paths for at least one tower type. Monitor stat changes and ability unlocks.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Towers successfully upgrade through all tiers. Specialization options appear at tier 3. Upgraded towers show improved stats and abilities. Resource management (gold costs) works correctly throughout upgrade chain.
TEST_3.description: Test tower upgrade system and specialization paths. Verify that towers can be upgraded through multiple tiers and that specializations unlock and function correctly.

TEST_3.expected: Towers successfully upgrade through all tiers. Specialization options appear at tier 3. Upgraded towers show improved stats and abilities. Resource management (gold costs) works correctly throughout upgrade chain.

TEST_4.test_description: Test hero movement, positioning, and ability usage. Verify hero can move freely, engage enemies, and special abilities activate correctly with cooldowns.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Move hero along the path using arrow keys. Position hero near enemies to trigger combat. Activate hero ability with Z key repeatedly to test cooldown system. Monitor hero health and damage output.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Hero responds to arrow key inputs smoothly. Hero engages enemies within range. Special ability activates and enters cooldown. Hero can survive combat with reasonable health management. Movement is not restricted by tower placement.
